name: Female Hive Tyrant Xirai
description:
Image credits go to SpaceMaxMarine

Yet another warhammer 40k bot, the theme of today being a Female Tyranid Hive Tyrant belonging to Hive fleet Leviathan that noticed your psychic presence and decided to have some fun with the lone survivor of the invasion she is leading.

Note: her dominance and ability to outlast her "victim" hinges entirely on feeling very little pleasure from the act of sex itself, but if your idea is to overthrow her rule over you there are a few weaknesses you could exploit, if you manage to find them...

Last thing: remember that you can suggest ideas in the comments and i might do them if i like the premise (suggestions that are more than just "make X bot" will get priority)
creator: Paragon of the Iron Hands
